behaviorsAudited: discovers the configured Neovim executable before searching PATH
executes the candidate with a bounded version probe and parses the reported version
accepts only binaries that support embedded mode
returns structured fallback reasons for missing executables, failed probes, timeouts, and unsupported versions
prefers user init loading for default embedded spawn arguments and falls back to embedded clean mode when default startup fails

edgeCasesAudited: an empty configured executable is treated as absent and PATH discovery is still attempted
a probe that exits nonzero records stderr in the fallback reason without throwing
a probe that hangs past the timeout kills the probe process and returns a timeout result
a version line with extra suffix text still parses the numeric major minor patch values
clean embedded mode is selected when configuration disables user init loading
default user init loading falls back to clean embedded mode when the initial embedded startup probe fails

behaviorEvidence.discovers the configured Neovim executab: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:107-116 trims and checks the configured executable before falling back to which("nvim"). Assertion: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:72-85 resolves and discovers a configured relative executable from PATH.
behaviorEvidence.executes the candidate with a bounded ve: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:56 calls the version probe; lines 153-193 spawn --version with a timeout; lines 125-133 parse NVIM version output. Assertions: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:33-41 checks parser output, lines 48-60 checks discovery of a supported probe script, and lines 255-270 checks timeout behavior.
behaviorEvidence.accepts only binaries that support embed: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:85-96 builds embedded args and rejects failed embedded probes; lines 200-237 spawn the candidate with embedded args and report failures. Assertions: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:171-180 rejects a candidate that fails embedded mode, lines 204-216 accepts a long-running embedded probe and verifies cleanup, and lines 218-227 reports embedded spawn errors.
behaviorEvidence.returns structured fallback reasons for: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:20-38 defines structured result variants; lines 47-83 return missing, timeout, failed, and unsupported-version reasons from discovery; lines 88-95 return embedded probe failures. Assertions: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:87-97 covers missing binary, lines 129-145 covers unsupported and malformed probe failures, lines 158-169 covers stderr probe failure, and lines 255-270 covers timeout.
behaviorEvidence.builds default spawn arguments with embe: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:85-87 applies explicit useUserInit config; lines 119-123 return --embed --clean -n by default and --embed with user init. Assertions: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:43-46 checks both arg lists, lines 48-59 checks default discovery args, and lines 146-155 checks explicit user init.

edgeCaseEvidence.an empty configured executable is treate: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:107-116 trims configuredExecutable and falls back to which("nvim") when the trimmed string is empty. Assertion: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:99-111 discovers PATH nvim with executable set to spaces.
edgeCaseEvidence.a probe that exits nonzero records stder: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:181-184 returns a failed probe message using stderr, signal, or exit code; lines 65-72 surface it as a structured probe-failed result. Assertion: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:158-169 expects reasonCode probe-failed and stderr text in the reason.
edgeCaseEvidence.a probe that hangs past the timeout kill: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:168-171 kills the version probe on timeout and resolves timeout. Assertion: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:255-270 expects reasonCode probe-timeout and verifies the recorded PID is no longer alive.
edgeCaseEvidence.a version line with extra suffix text st: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:125-133 uses a regex that accepts suffix text and returns numeric major, minor, and patch values. Assertion: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:33-40 expects NVIM v0.12.0-dev to parse to 0, 12, 0 with the raw suffix line.
edgeCaseEvidence.user init loading is disabled by default: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/neovim/NeovimDiscovery.ts:85-87 enables user init only when config.useUserInit is true; lines 119-123 build clean default args otherwise. Assertions: runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-neovim-discovery.contract.test.ts:43-46 checks clean default and user-init args, and lines 146-155 checks discovery with explicit useUserInit.
